summary: Shifted the opening to start inside the TV room so its entry construction is distinct from the adjacent chapter's timestamped med-room opening, replaced two calibration-only line collisions, and tightened the final count beat so Carmen's silent second number carries more directly into the next chapter.
edits: Reframed the opening around Carmen entering the TV room while keeping the post-survey timing and meeting setup intact.
Replaced the isolated calibration-only dialogue echoes "No." and "Sure." with character-true alternatives.
Adjusted the closing line so Carmen keeps the second count in her head before med pass, strengthening the handoff into chapter 11.
